name: creative-ideation
description: Free-form idea generation and connection. Explore widely, connect surprisingly.

fields.context: What ideas/patterns are already on the table?
fields.success: What makes an idea worth keeping?
fields.dead_ends: What makes an idea not useful?

discovery_prompt:
Ideas generated so far:

{previous_discoveries}

Generate 3 new ideas. Each should:
1. Connect to at least one existing idea in a non-obvious way
2. Draw from a different domain than previous ideas
3. Be specific enough to act on
4. Rate each idea: novelty (1-10), feasibility (1-10), impact (1-10)
